# meshstack_api_key (Resource)

Manages a meshStack API key.

The API key token is only available after initial creation and is stored (sensitive) in the Terraform state. It cannot be retrieved again from the API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "meshstack_api_key" "example" {
  workspace_identifier = "my-workspace"
  name                 = "ci-key"
  authorities          = ["meshfed.meshLandingZone.list", "meshfed.meshProject.list"]
  expiry_date          = "2025-12-31"
}

# The token is only available after creation.
# It is stored (sensitive) in state and cannot be retrieved again from the API.
output "api_key_token" {
  value     = meshstack_api_key.example.token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `authorities` (List of String) Authorities (permission shortcodes) assigned to the API key.
- `expiry_date` (String) Expiry date of the API key (ISO date, e.g. `2025-12-31`).
- `name` (String) Display name of the API key.
- `workspace_identifier` (String) Identifier of the workspace that owns the API key.

### Read-Only

- `created_on` (String) Creation timestamp of the API key.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Secret token of the API key. Only available after creation; cannot be retrieved again.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the API key (Keycloak clientId).
